questions.question: Describe the main difference between a latch and a flip-flop. Provide an example of each.
questions.hint: Clearly explain the difference between the two

questions.question: What is the purpose of a clock signal in a sequential circuit? Explain its effect on a latch or flip-flop.
questions.hint: Focus on the role of the clock signal

questions.question: Design a simple sequential circuit that implements a counter using two flip-flops. Label the inputs, outputs, and clock signal.
questions.hint: Use a suitable diagramming tool or software
